questions.prompt: Where did you park this morning?
questions.prompt_task_text: Where did you park this morning?
questions.answer: I parked by the athletic center instead.

questions.prompt: Are you almost done with the project?
questions.prompt_task_text: Are you almost done with the project?
questions.answer: I haven't started the data analysis yet.

questions.prompt: I can never remember when office hours are.
questions.prompt_task_text: I can never remember when office hours are.
questions.answer: You can find them on the syllabus.

questions.prompt: Did you check out the tutoring center?
questions.prompt_task_text: Did you check out the tutoring center?
questions.answer: I want to know whether they help with statistics.

questions.prompt: Have you picked your thesis topic yet?
questions.prompt_task_text: Have you picked your thesis topic yet?
questions.answer: I chose the subject that my professor suggested last spring.

questions.prompt: Where can I do laundry while the machines are down?
questions.prompt_task_text: Where can I do laundry while the machines are down?
questions.answer: The closest open laundromat is just two blocks away.

questions.prompt: I need to drop a class.
questions.prompt_task_text: I need to drop a class.
questions.answer: Do you know if the deadline has passed already?

questions.prompt: Did you decide between the two dorms?
questions.prompt_task_text: Did you decide between the two dorms?
questions.answer: I prefer the residence hall that has the bigger common study lounge.

questions.prompt: Do you have any plans after midterms?
questions.prompt_task_text: Do you have any plans after midterms?
questions.answer: I'm taking this whole weekend off to recharge.

questions.prompt: Did you get into that popular class?
questions.prompt_task_text: Did you get into that popular class?
questions.answer: I asked the registrar whether the class I wanted still had open spots.

questions.prompt: When does the campus cafe close these days?
questions.prompt_task_text: When does the campus cafe close these days?
questions.answer: The campus cafe now closes at nine.

questions.prompt: Did you finish the problem set?
questions.prompt_task_text: Did you finish the problem set?
questions.answer: I couldn't solve the last two questions.

questions.prompt: Are you going to the research assistant orientation?
questions.prompt_task_text: Are you going to the research assistant orientation?
questions.answer: I want to know whether they expect everyone to attend.

questions.prompt: Did you find a good study playlist?
questions.prompt_task_text: Did you find a good study playlist?
questions.answer: I shared the playlist that helps me focus better.

questions.prompt: I'm not sure which dining hall to try.
questions.prompt_task_text: I'm not sure which dining hall to try.
questions.answer: You should try the one that serves late-night food.

questions.prompt: Are you signing up for any clubs this week?
questions.prompt_task_text: Are you signing up for any clubs this week?
questions.answer: I'm leaning toward joining the photography club this term.

questions.prompt: Why does your exam schedule look so rough?
questions.prompt_task_text: Why does your exam schedule look so rough?
questions.answer: Three final exams land on the same day.

questions.prompt: The library reorganized the study rooms.
questions.prompt_task_text: The library reorganized the study rooms.
questions.answer: Do you know how to reserve one now?

questions.prompt: Did you find a charger before the deadline?
questions.prompt_task_text: Did you find a charger before the deadline?
questions.answer: I borrowed a charger from the friend who sits beside me.

questions.prompt: Are you prepared for your advising meeting?
questions.prompt_task_text: Are you prepared for your advising meeting?
questions.answer: I asked the upperclassmen which electives they would recommend for my major.
